{{Infobox group
| name = Court
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Court]] paid a fortune in compensation to others.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Court]] assigns low-ranking [[Abidan]] to worlds.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Court]] is preventing [[Cirian]]'s [[Judge]] from interfering with the Reapers.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“Of course, the Court has already assigned a low-ranking Abidan to this world,” Eithan went on.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
